title: Specify cache-meta.yaml
description: Validates the structure of `.specify/.cache/.cache-meta.yaml`. Written by skills (the agent) whenever they populate or refresh the cache; read by the CLI during schema resolution.

schema_url.description: The `schema` value the cache was populated from. Bare-name schemas use `local:<name>` (e.g. `local:omnia`); URL-based schemas use the full URL including `@ref` when present.

fetched_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp (UTC) of when the agent wrote the cache.
